text: Being here, I feel a mixture of curiosity and anticipation. The clean, modern lines and glass doors invite me to cross a threshold into a place of knowledge and possibility. The exhibition—boldly marked R+D—whispers of human ingenuity, an ongoing dialogue between inquiry and invention. Surrounded by the hum of quietly purposeful people and glowing screens, I sense both the isolation of fine-tuned focus and the communal pursuit of understanding. I am both an observer and a participant in the evolving story of discovery, and that fills me with wonder.
